title: Arihant Publications is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Arihant Publications is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
